73547.subject: Turn 10,000 FIFA Points into FIFA World Cup 26™tickets
73547.body:
TICKET DROPS ARE COMING

10 MATCHES | 10 PAIRS PER MATCH | 10K POINTS

For the first time ever, FIFA Rewards members can redeem 10,000 FIFA Points for
a pair of FIFA World Cup 26™ tickets across 10 matches in the USA, Mexico and
Canada.

Across five separate drops beginning Thursday 28 May 2026, fans will have the
opportunity to redeem one of 10 ticket pairs available per match, while supplies
last.

[GO TO REWARDS]
https://www.fifa.com/en/rewards?cid=(p_email)(c_rewards)(sc_rewards-ticket-drop)(ssc_fwc-2026)(l_en)(da_240526)(id_fifa-rewards-ticket-drops-en-240526-email-final)(cc_fifa-rewards)

Drop starts 28 May 2026

Drop starts 28 May 2026

Drop starts 2 June 2026

Drop starts 8 June 2026

Drop starts 11 June 2026

Drop starts 15 June 2026

Drop starts 8 June 2026

Drop starts 15 June 2026

Drop starts 11 June 2026

Drop starts 15 June 2026

EARN YOUR WAY TO 10,000 POINTS

MORE WAYS TO EARN ARE COMING

Ticket drops start 28 May, and there are plenty of ways to build your FIFA
Points balance before then.

Earn points by completing digital activities with FIFA, then claim daily points
for logging in and watching videos and articles. Take part in Weekly Challenges
to unlock 2–10x FIFA Points boosts.

Coming soon, you’ll also be able to earn points with FIFA PlayZone, Roblox FIFA
Super Soccer!, FIFA Rivals and check-ins across FIFA World Cup 26™ host cities.

[START EARNING]
https://www.fifa.com/rewards/earn?cid=(p_email)(c_rewards)(sc_rewards-ticket-drop)(ssc_fwc-2026)(l_en)(da_240526)(id_fifa-rewards-ticket-drops-en-240526-email-final)(cc_fifa-rewards)

Limited Reward Details: Limit of ten (10) pairs of FIFA World Cup 2026 Match
tickets available in exchange for 10,000 FIFA Points via this limited reward
drop. Limited reward drop starts 28 May 2026, while supplies last. To qualify,
click the Rewards tab, locate the FIFA World Cup 2026 Match Tickets and follow
the standard reward redemption process to redeem one (1) pair of FIFA World Cup
2026 Match Tickets, while supplies last. Tickets are not guaranteed until points
redemption transaction is complete. Sponsor is not responsible if tickets sell
out prior to completion of redemption transaction and no compensation will be
provided in such case. In the event of depletion, Sponsor will provide
alternate, comparable 10,000 point-rewards item(s) in the Rewards Feed. Once
issued, tickets cannot be exchanged for cash or sold; tickets subject to the
terms and conditions of the tickets themselves and do not include travel,
accommodations or incidental expenses (which are the participant's sole
responsibility). Eligibility: Limited Reward drop available to FIFA Rewards
participants, subject to FIFA Rewards program Terms of Service available here.
Points balances accessible via Account at any time. Msg&data rates may apply if
participating via mobile device. Void where prohibited. Sponsor: My Rewards LLC,
201 Main Street, Suite 102, Carbo

73546.subject: 🟪 Just in case
73546.body:
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/3f889764-4c4c-426b-b0fe-da4071761d08/BD-Banner-Sponsor_Template.png?t=1779483553)
Follow image link: (https://ore.supply/)
Caption: 

This week, Blockworks hosted the Jito Q1 2026 quarterly call. 

The dominant story of Q1 for Jito was continued adoption of the Block Assembly Marketplace (BAM). BAM's stake share grew from 14.0% to 28.1%, with the validator count up 56% to 363 and SOL staked to BAM rising from 59.2M to 119.3M ($9.83B). Combined with the Jito-Solana client, Jito's block-building stack runs on roughly 60% of network stake, compared to Harmonic's 16.8%.

On the financial side, Jito generated $2.33M in protocol revenue and processed $19.85M in gross tips across 1.04B transactions. Revenue declined QoQ in USD terms, reflecting lower SOL price and reduced on-chain activity versus Q4 2025. TipRouter's share of protocol revenue rose from 19.4% to 23.1%, while epoch fees remained the largest stream at $836K (35.8%).

JitoSOL TVL was $1.02B with a 30-day implied APY of 8.03%. Market share among Solana LSTs was 19.2%, down from 21.8% at the start of the quarter, though it remains the largest standalone LST. Supply declined 14.8%, which the report attributes to the SOL price drop and competitive pressure from Sanctum-issued LSTs.

Institutional distribution continued to build out. 21Shares launched the JSOL ETP on Euronext in January (ending Q1 at $582K AUM), Hanwha Asset Management signed an MOU in February to develop a JitoSOL ETP for South Korea, and VanEck's JitoSOL ETF entered SEC review on March 10.

On the tokenomics side, 9.71M JTO was burned in Q1, bringing cumulative burns to 13.48M. Buybacks were paused under JIP-31 to redirect revenue toward BAM adoption incentives.

Topics for Wednesday's call included the BAM plugin pipeline (Maker Priority Plugin launched late April), the JTX launch (unveiled May 5, early June launch), the VanEck ETF review, and the JIP-33 Coinbase collaboration.

Check out the call recording, download the report, and access the transcript at [Blockworks.com](https://blockworks.com/quarterly-calls/jito-26-q1).

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/e60d7cde-4250-41f8-9443-28ed51b80560/divider_transparent.png?t=1774649182)
Caption: 

Brought to you by:

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/db4435e5-fc7e-4eff-9e1e-3dfbf7303a69/Image_from_iOS__14_.jpg?t=1779483488)
Follow image link: (https://ore.supply/)
Caption: 

[Mine ORE](https://ore.supply/).

ORE is a digital store of value native to Solana, built for self-custody and permissionless use.

Try the [official mining client today](https://ore.supply/).

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format

73274.subject: Svadobná výzdoba
73274.body:
Zdravíme nevestu💍🤍,

Ďakujeme veľmi pekne za vašu správu.. Termín svadby máme ešte voľný a veľmi
radi budeme súčasťou vašej svadby.🤍

Spravidla sa s klientami stretávame osobne v showroome v Rozhanovciach
(kúsok od Košíc) kde si spolu vieme vyskladať svadobnú výzdobu a na základe
toho vytvoriť cenovú ponuku na mieru pre vás ak by ste mali záujem prosím
navrhnite deň a čas kedy by vám to najviac vyhovovalo aby sa časovo radi
prispôsobíme vášmu času. Poprípade, ak sme mimo Košíc či Prešova, radi si s
Vami dohodneme videohovor. Prosím navrhnite deň a čas, ktorý by Vám
vyhovoval najviac, pokojne aj cez víkend aj vo večerných hodinách. 🙂
Najbližsie voľne termíny máme ešte aj tento týždeň. Forme stretnutia sa
radi prispôsobíme Vám, čo je pre Vás praktickejšie ☺️

Budeme sa tešiť na prípadnú spoluprácu s Vami.

S pozdravom

Lenka Gattiker,
Vaša osobná posh asistentka
